# llms.txt — AI Context for tg_db

## What is this project?
Single-user Telegram personal knowledge base bot. Saves and retrieves links, forwarded
Telegram messages, and notes. Backend: Python + aiogram v3 + PostgreSQL.

## Status
Phase 1 complete (42/42 tasks done). Phase 2 not started.

## Stack
- Python 3.12+, aiogram v3, SQLAlchemy 2 async, Alembic, PostgreSQL 16+
- Bot runs in long polling mode (no public webhook needed)

## Vibe Layer Map (read these in order)
1. LAYER-1/rules.md           — project invariants (read BEFORE making any change)
2. LAYER-2/specs/architecture.md — components and service contracts
3. LAYER-2/specs/domain-model.md — entities, DB schema, indexes
4. LAYER-2/specs/behaviors.md    — user flows, bot commands, business rules
5. LAYER-3/HANDOFF.md            — current session state (read FIRST each session)

## Key Constraints (never violate)
- Exactly 6 statuses: New, To Read, Important, Archive, Verified, Outdated
- Single-user allowlist on every handler
- Any DB schema change requires an Alembic migration
- Secrets in .env only — never committed

## Do NOT read
- tz-tg_db.md  (archived source — superseded by LAYER-2/specs/)
